steps.title: Check the verb pattern
steps.content: The sentence says the Olympic committee “decided” something about tug-of-war. In Standard English, decide is followed by an infinitive when naming the action chosen.

steps.title: Choose the infinitive
steps.content: Choice A is past tense, Choice B is an -ing form, and Choice C lacks to. The sentence needs “decided to include tug-of-war” to express the committee's decision. The answer is D.
